  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AaChannelMessagesOnlyIn3xRule
    Rule: CHAN-008 Validates that the 'messages' property only exists in AsyncAPI 3.x channels.
    AaChannelOperationsIn2xOnlyRule
    Rule: CHAN-009 Validates that subscribe/publish operations only exist in AsyncAPI 2.x channels.
    AaInfoExternalDocsOnlyIn3xRule
    Rule: INF-006 Validates that the 'externalDocs' property in Info only appears in AsyncAPI 3.x documents.
    AaInfoTagsOnlyIn3xRule
    Rule: INF-005 Validates that the 'tags' property in Info only appears in AsyncAPI 3.x documents.
    AaInvalidAsyncApiVersionFormatRule
    Rule: AAD-004 Validates that the AsyncAPI version property matches the expected pattern.
    AaInvalidChannelDescriptionRule
    Rule: CHAN-002 Validates that Channel description is in valid CommonMark format if provided.
    AaInvalidChannelReferenceRule
    Rule: CHAN-003 Validates that Channel $ref property points to a valid channel definition in components.
    AaInvalidComponentKeyNameRule
    Implements the Invalid Component Key Name Pattern rule for AsyncAPI.
    AaInvalidCorrelationIdDescriptionRule
    Rule: AACID-001 Implements the Invalid Correlation ID Description rule for AsyncAPI.
    AaInvalidCorrelationIdLocationFormatRule
    Rule: AACID-002 Validates that correlation ID location is a valid runtime expression.
    AaInvalidCorrelationIdReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Correlation ID Reference rule for AsyncAPI.
    AaInvalidDefaultContentTypeRule
    Rule: AAD-006 Validates that the AsyncAPI document defaultContentType property is a valid MIME type if provided.
    AaInvalidDocumentIdFormatRule
    Rule: AAD-005 Validates that the AsyncAPI document ID property is a valid URI/identifier if provided.
    AaInvalidExternalDocsReferenceRule
    Rule: AAED-002 Validates that external documentation references point to valid external docs in components.
    AaInvalidMessageContentTypeRule
    Implements the Invalid Message Content Type rule for AsyncAPI.
    AaInvalidMessageDescriptionRule
    Implements the Invalid Message Description rule for AsyncAPI.
    AaInvalidMessageReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Message Reference rule for AsyncAPI (AAO-008).
    AaInvalidMessageSchemaFormatRule
    Implements the Invalid Message Schema Format rule for AsyncAPI.
    AaInvalidMessageTraitReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Message Trait Reference rule for AsyncAPI.
    AaInvalidMultiFormatSchemaReferenceRule
    Rule: AAMFS-003 Validates that a MultiFormatSchema's $ref property points to a valid schema definition in components.
    AaInvalidOperationActionValueRule
    Rule: AAO-004 Validates that AsyncAPI 3.x Operation action is either "send" or "receive".
    AaInvalidOperationChannelReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Operation Channel Reference rule for AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AaInvalidOperationTraitReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Operation Trait Reference rule for AsyncAPI.
    AaInvalidParameterLocationValueRule
    Implements the Invalid Parameter Location Value rule for AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AaInvalidReplyAddressLocationRule
    Implements the Invalid Reply Address Location rule for AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AaInvalidReplyAddressReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Reply Address Reference rule for AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AaInvalidReplyChannelReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Reply Channel Reference rule for AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AaInvalidReplyMessageReferencesRule
    Implements the Invalid Reply Message References rule for AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AaInvalidReplyReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Reply Reference rule for AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AaInvalidServerHostFormatRule
    Rule: SRV-006 Validates that a Server's host property in AsyncAPI 3.x is a valid hostname or IP address.
    AaInvalidServerPathnameFormatRule
    Rule: SRV-007 Validates that a Server's pathname property in AsyncAPI 3.x begins with '/' if provided.
    AaInvalidServerReferenceInChannelRule
    Rule: CHAN-004 Validates that server references in channel.servers point to valid servers defined in the document.
    AaInvalidServerReferenceRule
    Rule: SRV-008 Validates that a Server's $ref property points to a valid server definition in components.
    AaInvalidServerVariableReferenceRule
    Rule: SVAR-005 Validates that a ServerVariable's $ref property points to a valid server variable definition in components.
    AaInvalidTagReferenceRule
    Rule: AATAG-001 Validates that tag references point to valid tags in components.
    AaMessageMessageIdIn24To26Rule
    Rule: AAM-014 Validates that messages only use messageId in AsyncAPI 2.4-2.6.
    AaMessageNoMessageIdIn3xRule
    Rule: AAM-013 Validates that messages do not use messageId in AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AaMessageOneOfMutualExclusivityRule
    Implements the AAM-009 rule: Message OneOf Mutually Exclusive.
    AaMessageTraitMessageIdIn24To26Rule
    Rule: AAMTRT-002 Validates that message traits only use messageId in AsyncAPI 2.4-2.6.
    AaMessageTraitNoMessageIdIn3xRule
    Rule: AAMTRT-004 Validates that message traits do not use messageId in AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AaMissingAsyncApiPropertyRule
    Rule: AAD-001 Validates that AsyncAPI documents have the required 'asyncapi' property specifying the version.
    AaMissingChannelAddressRule
    Rule: CHAN-001 Validates that AsyncAPI 3.x Channel entities have the required 'address' property.
    AaMissingChannelsPropertyRule
    Rule: AAD-003 Validates that AsyncAPI 2.x documents have the required 'channels' property.
    AaMissingCorrelationIdLocationRule
     
    AaMissingMessagePayloadOrHeadersRule
    Implements the Missing Message Payload or Headers rule for AsyncAPI.
    AaMissingOperationActionRule
    Rule: AAO-001 Validates that AsyncAPI 3.x Operation has a required 'action' property.
    AaMissingOperationChannelReferenceRule
    Rule: AAO-002 Validates that AsyncAPI 3.x Operation has a required 'channel' reference.
    AaMissingParameterLocationRule
    Implements the Missing Parameter Location rule for AsyncAPI 2.x.
    AaMissingParameterSchemaRule
    Implements the Missing Parameter Schema rule for AsyncAPI 2.x.
    AaMissingSchemaDefinitionRule
    Implements the Missing Schema Definition rule for AsyncAPI 3.x MultiFormatSchema.
    AaMissingServerHostRule
    Rule: SRV-005 Validates that a Server has a 'host' property in AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AaOAuthFlowScopesVsAvailableScopesRule
    Rule: AAFLOW-001 Validates that OAuth flows use the correct property name for scopes based on AsyncAPI version.
    AaOperationMessageVsMessagesRule
    Validates that operations use the correct message property for their version.
    AaOperationReferenceableOnlyIn3xRule
    Validates that the operation $ref property is only used in AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AaOperationReplyOnlyIn3xRule
    Validates that the operation reply property is only used in AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AaOperationSecurityPropertyOnlyIn24PlusRule
    Validates that the operation security property is only used in AsyncAPI 2.4+.
    AaOperationsOnlyIn3xRule
    Rule: AAD-007 Validates that the 'operations' property only appears in AsyncAPI 3.x documents.
    AaOperationTraitOperationIdIn2xOnlyRule
    Validates that operation traits in AsyncAPI 3.x do not have the operationId property.
    AaOperationTraitSecurityIn24PlusRule
    Validates that the operation trait security property is only used in AsyncAPI 2.4+.
    AaParameterDefaultNotInEnumRule
    Implements the Parameter Default Not in Enum rule for AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AaParameterStructureChangedIn3xRule
    Implements the Parameter Structure Changed in 3.x rule for AsyncAPI.
    AaSecuritySchemeScopesOnlyIn3xRule
    Rule: AASS-002 Validates that the 'scopes' property is only used in security schemes in AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AaServerReferenceableOnlyIn23PlusRule
    Rule: SRV-009 Validates that servers can only use $ref starting in AsyncAPI 2.3.
    AaServersPropertyOnlyIn22PlusRule
    Rule: CHAN-006 Validates that the 'servers' property in channels only exists starting in AsyncAPI 2.2.
    AaServerStructureChangedIn3xRule
    Rule: SRV-012 Validates that AsyncAPI 3.x servers use the new structure.
    AaServerTagsOnlyIn25PlusRule
    Rule: SRV-010 Validates that servers can only have tags starting in AsyncAPI 2.5.
    AaServerVariableDefaultNotInEnumRule
    Implements the SVAR-004 rule: Server Variable Default Not in Enum.
    AaServerVariableReferenceableOnlyIn24PlusRule
    Rule: SVAR-006 Validates that server variables can only use $ref starting in AsyncAPI 2.4.
    AasMissingServerProtocolRule
     
    AbstractCommand
    A base class for all command implementations.
    AbstractInvalidPropertyValueRule
    Base class for all Invalid Property Value rules.
    AbstractReplaceNodeCommand<T>
    Base class for commands that replace entire nodes.
    AbstractSchemaInhCommand
     
    AbstractTraverser
    Base class for all traversers.
    AddCallbackCommand
    A command used to add a callback to an operation or to components/callbacks.
    AddChannelItemCommand
    A command used to add a new channelItem in a document.
    AddExampleCommand
    A command used to add an Example to a MediaType, Parameter, or Header.
    AddExampleDefinitionCommand
    A command used to add a new example definition in a document.
    AddExtensionCommand
    A command used to add a vendor extension to any extensible node.
    AddHeaderDefinitionCommand
    A command used to add a new header definition in a document.
    AddLinkCommand
    A command used to add a link to a response or to components/links.
    AddMediaTypeCommand
    A command used to add a media type to any node that supports content (request body, response, header, parameter).
    AddOperationSecurityRequirementCommand
    A command used to add a security requirement to an operation.
    AddParameterCommand
    A command used to add a new parameter to a path item or operation.
    AddParameterDefinitionCommand
    A command used to add a new parameter definition in a document.
    AddPathItemCommand
    A command used to add a new pathItem in a document.
    AddRequestBodyCommand
    A command used to add a request body to an operation (OpenAPI 3.0+ only).
    AddRequestBodyDefinitionCommand
    A command used to add a new request body definition in a document.
    AddResponseCommand
    A command used to add a response to an operation.
    AddResponseDefinitionCommand
    A command used to add a new response definition in a document.
    AddResponseHeaderCommand
    A command used to add a header to a response.
    AddSchemaDefinitionCommand
    A command used to add a new definition in a document.
    AddSchemaPropertyCommand
    A command used to add a new property to a schema definition in a document.
    AddSecurityRequirementCommand
    A command used to create a new security requirement in a document.
    AddSecuritySchemeCommand
    A command used to add a new security scheme to a document.
    AddServerCommand
    A command used to add a new server to any node that supports servers.
    AddServerVariableCommand
    A command used to add a variable to a server.
    AddTagCommand
    A command used to add a new tag to a document.
    AggregateCommand
    A command used to aggregate an array of other commands into a single logical command.
    AllNodeVisitor
     
    AllReferenceableNodeVisitor
    Simple visitor used to visit Referenceable nodes.
    AnySchemaUnion

    ChangeContactCommand
     
    ChangeDescriptionCommand
    A command used to modify the description of a document.
    ChangeExtensionCommand
    A command used to change the value of a vendor extension on any extensible node.
    ChangeLicenseCommand
    A command used to modify the license information of a document.
    ChangeMediaTypeSchemaCommand
    A command used to set or change the schema on a media type entry.
    ChangePropertyCommand<T>
    A command used to modify the simple property of a node.
    ChangeTitleCommand
    A command used to modify the title of a document.
    ChangeVersionCommand
    A command used to modify the version of a document.
    CombinedAsyncApiVisitor
     
    CombinedAsyncApiVisitorAdapter
     
    CombinedJsonSchemaVisitor
     
    CombinedJsonSchemaVisitorAdapter
     
    CombinedOpenApiVisitor
     
    CombinedOpenApiVisitorAdapter
     
    CombinedVisitor
     
    CombinedVisitorAdapter
     
    CommandFactory
     
    CommandUtil
    Utility class for marshalling (Command → JSON) and unmarshalling (JSON → Command) of ICommand instances.
    CommandUtil.ICommandDeserializer
    Custom Jackson deserializer for ICommand fields.
    CommandUtil.NodePathDeserializer
    Custom Jackson deserializer for NodePath fields.
    CommandUtil.NodePathSerializer
    Custom Jackson serializer for NodePath fields.
    Components
     
    CompositeAllNodeVisitor
    A composite visitor base class useful for any data model type.
    ConsumesProducesFinder
    Finds the first path item.
    Contact
     
    CreateOperationCommand
    A command used to create a new operation on a path item.
    CreatePathCommand
    A command used to create a new empty path item in a document.
    CreateSchemaCommand
    A command used to create a new empty schema definition in a document.
    DataModelUtil
     
    DefaultSeverityRegistry
    A default severity registry.
    DefinitionDetectionVisitor
     
    DeleteAllChildSchemasCommand
    A command used to delete all child schemas from a schema.
    DeleteAllExamplesCommand
    A command used to delete a single mediaType from an operation.
    DeleteAllExtensionsCommand
    A command used to delete all extensions from a node.
    DeleteAllHeadersCommand
    A command used to delete all headers from a document.
    DeleteAllOperationsCommand
    A command used to delete all operations from a path
    DeleteAllParametersCommand
    A command used to delete all parameters from: PathItem, Operation
    DeleteAllPropertiesCommand
    A command used to delete all properties from a schema.
    DeleteAllResponsesCommand
     
    DeleteAllSecurityRequirementsCommand
    A command used to delete all security requirements from a document or operation.
    DeleteAllSecuritySchemesCommand
    A command used to delete all security schemes from a document or operation.
    DeleteAllServersCommand
    A command used to delete all servers from a document.
    DeleteAllTagsCommand
    A command used to delete all tags from a document.
    DeleteCallbackCommand
    A command used to delete a callback from an operation or from components/callbacks.
    DeleteContactCommand
    A command used to delete the contact.
    DeleteExampleDefinitionCommand
    A command used to delete a single reusable example definition from a document.
    DeleteExtensionCommand
    A command used to delete a single extension.
    DeleteHeaderDefinitionCommand
    A command used to delete a single reusable header definition from a document.
    DeleteLicenseCommand
    A command used to delete the license.
    DeleteLinkCommand
    A command used to delete a link from a response or from components/links.
    DeleteMediaTypeCommand
    A command used to delete a single mediaType from an operation.
    DeleteMediaTypeCommand.MediaTypeRemover
     
    DeleteMediaTypeCommand.MediaTypeRestorer
     
    DeleteNodeCommand<T>
    A command used to delete a child node.
    DeleteOperationCommand
    A command used to delete an operation from a path item.
    DeleteOperationSecurityRequirementCommand
    A command used to delete a security requirement from an operation by index.
    DeleteParameterCommand
    A command used to delete a parameter from a path item or operation.
    DeleteParameterDefinitionCommand
    A command used to delete a single reusable parameter definition from a document.
    DeletePathCommand
    A command used to delete a path item from a document.
    DeleteRequestBodyCommand
    A command used to delete a request body from an operation (OpenAPI 3.0+ only).
    DeleteRequestBodyDefinitionCommand
    A command used to delete a single reusable request body definition from a document.
    DeleteResponseCommand
    A command used to delete a response from an operation.
    DeleteResponseHeaderCommand
    A command used to delete a header from a response.
    DeleteSchemaCommand
    A command used to delete a schema definition from a document.
    DeleteSchemaPropertyCommand
    A command used to delete a single property from a schema definition in a document.
    DeleteSecurityRequirementCommand
    A command used to delete a document-level security requirement by index.
    DeleteSecuritySchemeCommand
    A command used to delete a single security scheme from a document.
    DeleteServerCommand
    A command used to delete a server from any node that supports servers.
    DeleteServerVariableCommand
    A command used to delete a variable from a server.
    DeleteTagCommand
    A command used to delete a single tag from a document.
    DereferenceConstants
     
    Dereferencer
     
    Document
     
    EnsureChildNodeCommand
    A command used to ensure that a child node exists.

    ICommand

    Simple visitor used to mark internal references as "resolved".

    IReferenceResolver
    Used to resolve references ($ref or operationRef) to a JSON object.
    IsDefinitionParentVisitor
    Visitor to determine if a Node is a "Components" node.
    IValidationProblemReporter
    Interface used when performing validation - this gathers up any validation problem found so that they can be reported in some sensible way.
    IValidationSeverityRegistry
    An interface used to provide a severity registry.

    OasAdditionalOperationsInvalidKeyRule
    Validates that additionalOperations keys in a PathItem do not duplicate the fixed HTTP method fields (get, put, post, delete, options, head, patch, trace, query).
    OasAllowReservedNotAllowedForParamRule
     
    OasAllowReservedNotAllowedRule
    Implements the Allow Reserved Not Allowed rule.
    OasBodyAndFormDataMutualExclusivityRule
    Implements the Body and Form Data Mutual Exclusivity Rule.
    OasBodyParameterUniquenessValidationRule
    Implements the Body Parameter Uniqueness validation rule (can only have 1 body param).
    OasDuplicatePathSegmentRule
    Implements the Duplicate Path Segment Rule.
    OasEmptyPathSegmentRule
    Implements the Empty Path Segment Rule.
    OasEncodingStyleNotAllowedRule
    Implements the Encoding Style Not Allowed rule.

    OasExampleValueMutualExclusivityRule

    Implements the Explode Not Allowed rule.
    OasFormDataParamNotAllowedRule
    Implements the Form Data Parameter Not Allowed rule.
    OasHeaderExamplesMutualExclusivityRule
    Implements the Header Example/Examples Mutual Exclusivity Rule.
    OasHeaderSchemaContentMutualExclusivityRule
    Implements the Header Schema/Content Mutual Exclusivity Rule.

    Implements the Identical Path Template Rule.
    OasIgnoredContentTypeHeaderRule
    Implements the Ignored Content-Type Header validation rule.

    Validates that the Tag parent field references an existing tag name, and that no circular parent references exist.

    Validates that the XML nodeType field is one of the allowed values: element, attribute, text, cdata, none.

    OasMissingItemsArrayInformationRule
     
    OasMissingItemsTypeRule
     
    OasMissingOAuthFlowDeviceAuthUrlRule
    Validates that the Device Authorization OAuth flow has a deviceAuthorizationUrl.
    OasMissingOAuthSchemeAuthUrlRule
     
    OasMissingOAuthSchemeFlowTypeRule
     
    OasMissingOAuthSchemeScopesRule
     
    OasMissingOAuthSchemeTokenUrlRule

    OasMissingOperationResponsesRule
     
    OasMissingOperationTagsRule

    OasMissingRequestBodyContentRule
     
    OasMissingResponseDefinitionDescriptionRule
     
    OasMissingResponseDescriptionRule
     
    OasMissingResponseForOperationRule
     
    OasMissingSchemaArrayInformationRule
     
    OasMissingServerVarDefaultValueRule
     
    OasOperationIdUniquenessValidationRule
    Implements the Operation ID Uniqueness validation rule for both OpenAPI and AsyncAPI.
    OasOperationSummaryTooLongRule
    Implements the Operation Summary Too Long rule.
    OasParameterExamplesMutualExclusivityRule
    Implements the Parameter Example/Examples Mutual Exclusivity Rule.
    OasParameterSchemaContentMutualExclusivityRule
    Implements the Parameter Schema/Content Mutual Exclusivity Rule.
    OasParameterUniquenessValidationRule
    Implements the Parameter Uniqueness validation rule.
    OasPathParamNotFoundRule
    Implements the Path Parameter Not Found rule.
    OasPathParamsMustBeRequiredRule
     
    OasRequiredParamWithDefaultValueRule
    Implements the Required Parameter With Default Value rule.
    OasSecurityRequirementScopesMustBeEmptyRule
    Implements the Security Requirement Scopes Must Be Empty rule.
    OasServerVarNotFoundInTemplateRule
     
    OasTagParentCircularRefRule
    Validates that no circular references exist between parent and child tags.
    OasUnexpectedArrayCollectionFormatRule
    Implements the Unexpected Array Usage of 'collectionFormat' rule.
    OasUnexpectedHeaderCollectionFormatRule
    Implements the Unexpected Header Usage of 'collectionFormat' rule.
    OasUnexpectedHeaderUsageRule
    Implements the Unexpected Header Usage rule.
    OasUnexpectedNumberOfHeaderMTsRule
     
    OasUnexpectedNumOfParamMTsRule
     
    OasUnexpectedParamAllowEmptyValueRule
    Implements the Unexpected Parameter Usage of 'allowEmptyValue' rule.
    OasUnexpectedParamCollectionFormatRule
    Implements the Unexpected Parameter Usage of 'collectionFormat' rule.
    OasUnexpectedParamMultiRule
    Implements the Unexpected Parameter Usage of 'multi' rule.
    OasUnexpectedRequestBodyRule
     
    OasUnexpectedSecurityRequirementScopesRule
    Implements the Unexpected Security Requirement Scope(s) rule.
    OasUnexpectedUsageOfBearerTokenRule
     
    OasUnexpectedUsageOfDiscriminatorRule
    Validates that a discriminator is only used in a schema that utilizes oneOf, anyOf, or allOf composition, or is referenced as a base schema by other schemas via allOf, oneOf, or anyOf.
    OasUnexpectedXmlWrappingRule
    Implements the Unexpected XML Wrapping rule.
    OasUnknownApiKeyLocationRule
    Implements the Unknown API-Key Location rule.
    OasUnknownArrayCollectionFormatRule
    Implements the Unknown Array Collection Format rule.
    OasUnknownArrayFormatRule
    Implements the Unknown Array Format rule.
    OasUnknownArrayTypeRule
    Implements the Unknown Array Type rule.
    OasUnknownCookieParamStyleRule
     
    OasUnknownEncodingStyleRule
    Implements the Unknown Encoding Style rule.
    OasUnknownHeaderCollectionFormatRule
    Implements the Unknown Header Collection Format rule.
    OasUnknownHeaderFormatRule
    Implements the Unknown Header Format rule.
    OasUnknownHeaderParamStyleRule
     
    OasUnknownHeaderTypeRule
    Implements the Unknown Header Type rule.
    OasUnknownOauthFlowTypeRule
    Implements the Unknown OAuth Flow Type rule.
    OasUnknownParamCollectionFormatRule
    Implements the Unknown Parameter Collection Format rule.
    OasUnknownParamFormatRule
    Implements the Unknown Parameter Format rule.
    OasUnknownParamLocationRule
    Implements the Unknown Parameter Location rule.
    OasUnknownParamStyleRule
     
    OasUnknownParamTypeRule
    Implements the Unknown Parameter Type rule.
    OasUnknownPathParamStyleRule
     
    OasUnknownPropertyRule
    Implements the Unknown Property rule.
    OasUnknownQueryParamStyleRule
     
    OasUnknownSecuritySchemeTypeRule
    Implements the Unknown Security Scheme Type rule.
    OasUnmatchedEncodingPropertyRule
    Implements the Unmatched Encoding Property Rule.
    OasUnmatchedExampleTypeRule
    Implements the Unmatched Example Type Rule.
    OasXmlNodeTypeMutualExclusivityRule
    Implements the XML nodeType vs attribute/wrapped Mutual Exclusivity Rule.

    Implements the Duplicate Method Name validation rule.

    Implements the Invalid Content Descriptor Reference rule for OpenRPC.
    OrpcInvalidErrorReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Error Reference rule for OpenRPC.
    OrpcInvalidExamplePairingReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Example Pairing Reference rule for OpenRPC.
    OrpcInvalidExampleReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Example Reference rule for OpenRPC.
    OrpcInvalidLinkReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Link Reference rule for OpenRPC.
    OrpcInvalidMethodParamStructureRule
    Validates that the OpenRPC Method paramStructure value is valid.
    OrpcInvalidMethodReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Method Reference rule for OpenRPC.
    OrpcInvalidOpenRpcVersionFormatRule
    Validates that the OpenRPC version property matches the expected pattern.
    OrpcInvalidSchemaReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Schema Reference rule for OpenRPC.
    OrpcInvalidTagReferenceRule
    Implements the Invalid Tag Reference rule for OpenRPC.

    Implements the Missing Example Pairing Params validation rule.
    OrpcMissingLinkNameRule
    Implements the Missing Link Name validation rule.
    OrpcMissingMethodNameRule
    Implements the Missing Method Name validation rule.

    Implements the Missing Method Params validation rule.
    OrpcMissingOpenRpcPropertyRule

    OrpcMissingServerVariableDefaultRule

    Finds the first path item.

    ReaderUtil
     
    RefactorCallbackDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename a callback definition and update all $ref references.
    RefactorExampleDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename an example definition and update all $ref references.
    RefactorHeaderDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename a header definition and update all $ref references.
    RefactorLinkDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename a link definition and update all $ref references.
    RefactorParameterDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename a parameter definition and update all $ref references.
    RefactorRequestBodyDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename a request body definition and update all $ref references.
    RefactorResponseDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename a response definition and update all $ref references.
    RefactorSchemaDefinitionCommand
    A command used to rename a schema definition and update all $ref references.
    Reference
    Encapsulates a reference string in OpenAPI/AsyncAPI schema, for easier manipulation and parsing.
    Referenceable
     
    ReferenceContext
     
    ReferencedNodeImporter
     
    ReferenceResolverChain
    The chain of reference resolvers.
    ReferenceUtil
     
    RegexUtil
    Compatibility class used to bridge the gap between Java and JavaScript with respect to working with regular expressions.
    RenameTagCommand
    A command used to rename a tag.
    ReplaceOperationCommand
    A command used to replace an operation with a newer version.
    ReplacePathItemCommand
    A command used to replace a path item with a newer version.
    ReplaceResponseDefinitionCommand
    A command used to replace a response definition with a newer version.
    ReplaceSchemaDefinitionCommand
    A command used to replace a definition schema with a newer version.
    ReplaceSecurityRequirementCommand
    A command used to replace a definition schema with a newer version.
    RequiredPropertyValidationRule
    Base class for all Required Property rules.
    ResolvedReference
    Represents a resolved reference that can contain three different types of content: NODE: An Node representing an OpenAPI or AsyncAPI document/component JSON: A JsonNode representing JSON/YAML content that isn't OpenAPI/AsyncAPI TEXT: A String representing non-JSON content such as Protocol Buffers (.proto), GraphQL, Avro text schemas, etc.
    ResolvedReference.ResolvedReferenceType
    Enumeration of the types of content that can be contained in a ResolvedReference.

    Tag
     
    TagUniquenessValidationRule
    Implements the Tag Name Uniqueness validation rule.
    TraversalContext
    Context used during traversal of a model.
    TraversalContextImpl
    Context used during traversal of a model.
    TraversalStep
     
    TraversalStepType
     
    Traverser
    All data model traversers must implement this interface.
    TraverserDirection
     
    TraversingVisitor
    Any visitor that cares about traversal context can implement this interface (in addition to the standard Visitor interface).
    Union
     
    UnionValue<T>
     
    UnionValueImpl<T>
    Base class for all union value implementations.
    UnresolvedReferenceNodeVisitor
    Visitor used to find nodes that have a $ref that has not yet been resolved.
    UpdateNodeCommand
    A command used to update a node with new content.
    UpdateSecuritySchemeCommand
    A command used to update (replace) an existing security scheme in a document.
    ValidationProblem
    Models a single problem detected during validation of the data model.
    ValidationProblemSeverity
    The severity level of a single validation problem.
    ValidationRule
    Base class for all validation rule implementations.
    ValidationRule.PathSegment
    Type encapsulating information about a path segment.
    ValidationRuleMetaData
     
    ValidationRuleSet
    The full set of validation rules.
    ValidationUtil
    A compatibility layer containing methods used when performing validation.
    ValidationVisitor
    Base class for all validation visitors.
